title: scutellaria helenae
intro: Scutellaria helenae, also known as Helen's skullcap, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to China and the Himalayas. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is valued for its ability to soothe and calm the nervous system. The health benefits of Scutellaria helenae include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and exerting antimicrobial and antiviral activities. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to promote relaxation and support overall well-being.
